Kql: datatable(g:string,x:long)["a",5,"b",1,"b",3]|summarize sd=stdev(x) by g|sort by g asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(STDDEV_SAMP(x), 0) AS sd FROM (VALUES ('a', CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(g, x) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(s:string)["I like café au lait"]|where s has "café"
Sql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('I like café au lait')) AS t(s) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)(?:^|[^\p{L}\p{N}])café(?:[^\p{L}\p{N}]|$)')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (VALUES ('a'), (''), ('')) AS t(s) WHERE TRUE

Sql: SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT '[{"v":1},{"v":2},{"v":3},{"v":4}]'::JSON AS d) AS t, LATERAL (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS s FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT u.value AS e FROM UNNEST(CASE WHEN t.d IS NULL THEN CAST([NULL] AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'ARRAY' THEN CAST(t.d AS JSON[]) WHEN json_type(t.d) = 'OBJECT' THEN list_transform(json_keys(t.d), lambda k: json_object(k, json_extract(t.d, '$."' || k || '"'))) ELSE CAST([t.d] AS JSON[]) END) AS u(value)) WHERE (((TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER)) % NULLIF(2, 0)) + ABS(2)) % NULLIF(2, 0) = 0)) AS _sub
